steps.title: Identify the specific goal
steps.content: The student wants to specify the fanner basket's name in Choctaw. The notes provide that name: ufko tapushik. A correct answer must include this Choctaw term directly.

steps.title: Test each choice for the Choctaw name
steps.content:
• Choice A — The Hina Hanta archive features cultural artifacts, such as a fanner basket and a robe, that are relevant to the history of the Choctaw people.: mentions the fanner basket but omits its Choctaw name entirely. ✗
  • Choice B — The cane fanner basket, which is included in the Hina Hanta online archive, is called an ufko tapushik in Choctaw.: directly names the fanner basket and provides its Choctaw name ufko tapushik, fulfilling the goal exactly. ✓
  • Choice C — Hina Hanta, which means "bright path" in Choctaw, includes a fanner basket in its archive.: mentions the fanner basket but gives the archive's Choctaw meaning instead of the basket's Choctaw name. ✗
  • Choice D — The name of the online archive Hina Hanta means "bright path" in Choctaw.: discusses the archive's name in Choctaw; the fanner basket is not mentioned at all. ✗
B is correct.
